title: Kilned Burning Hearth dedicated curation closeout
body: Dedicated knowledge curation pass complete. Graduated ship-independent-coordinate-dependent into rule, platform adapters, RULES_INDEX, and start-right-team. Left n=2 coordination-efficiency owner-gated because PDR-082 remains Proposed. Proof: practice fitness strict-hard pass with SOFT only and 0 hard or critical, markdownlint root pass, git diff check pass, local path hygiene scan pass.
